caption: Fixes a regression in #743: after the last enemy dies mid-charge, the cavalry now visibly coasts forward on its residual speed before stopping, instead of freezing in place while current_speed silently counts down to zero. Root cause was UnitCombat's "spend the charge" strike-resolution reset zeroing _approach_velocity on the exact tick the finishing blow lands, leaving the idle-coast guard with no travel direction to work with. The fix falls back to `facing` in that specific case. Per-tick state transcript (position, current_speed) proves the coast: watch position advance smoothly across the dumped ticks as current_speed ramps down, rather than sitting frozen.
